competitors.aiSummary: Euler integrates ERC4626 vaults, DS Protocol compliance, and granular governance controls, targeting institutional capital and tokenized securities with enhanced operational controls.

tweets.fullText: @RWA_xyz Great piece - Euler has recently integrated Securitize-compatible ERC4626 vaults with DS Protocol compliance checks directly at the smart contract level and we look forward to seeing more institutional capital come onchain
@TomMurphyTweets it's happening 🤝

Read more here:
https://t.co/AT7VFwu6Qb

This positions Euler as the premier protocol for institutions seeking to unlock the liquidity potential of tokenized securities - bridging TradFi's compliance requirements with DeFi's capital efficiency in a way that no other lending protocol currently offers.

With granular governance controls including:
→ per-account freezing
→ supply caps
→ regulator-driven seizure capabilities

Euler delivers the operational controls required for real-world asset tokenization, without sacrificing the composability that makes DeFi powerful.

In June 2020, the Compound protocol was decentralized with the launch of COMP and the full transfer of control to the community through governance. As a foundational piece of decentralized finance infrastructure, Compound is designed to exist in perpetuity—open, autonomous, and

Attention: On 9/20/24 the Compound community’s Discord server was compromised.

Access has been regained and secured.

Always stay vigilant for scams and do not click any suspicious links.

As we noted, the issue did not impact the protocol; and no smart contracts were compromised.

We will provide further details on the investigation soon.

This is our final message // end of tweet.

✅ Update: Thanks to the tenacious efforts of so many in the community, the https://t.co/Dcq4ZkswRX website is once again secure. Please always remain vigilant in clicking links to avoid phishing scams.
